arts.ttl: 'Will happen'... Kris Boyd says Celtic are set to sign 'iconic figure' in January
arts.sum: Brendan Rodgers is confident Celtic will make additions over the course of the month but, so far, apart from the Kieran Tierney links to the Bhoys, the rumours have been few and far between. Boyd was speaking about the controversy over Brendan Rodgers’ criticism of Celtic fans singing Tierney’s name and the effect it would have on Greg Taylor when he claimed the big move ‘will happen’ this month.

arts.ttl: 'I don't need to bite my tongue' - Rodgers stands by Celtic post-match comments
arts.sum: Celtic manager Brendan Rodgers declared he had the right to air his emotions as he claimed the pursuit of unity was his main motivation in calling out the reaction of some fans on Sunday.

arts.ttl: Andy Halliday reveals what Brendan Rodgers told him after Celtic hammered Motherwell
arts.sum: Halliday and Rodgers enjoyed laugh on Celtic Park pitch “He didn’t say Open Goal, he said, ‘I enjoy listening to you on the radio’.

arts.ttl: “Wonderful… so cool” – Rangers player on slaying Celtic, and family predicting it
arts.sum: Rangers defender Robin Pröpper has admitted it was “wonderful” to beat Celtic, particularly as his family had predicted they would. The 31-year-old has been speaking to Voetbal International about the recent win over Brendan Rodgers’ side at Ibrox. arts.ttl: Stephen Welsh nears Celtic exit as defender 'completes medical'
arts.sum: Stephen Welsh nears Celtic exit as defender 'completes medical'.

arts.ttl: What Brendan Rodgers told Andy Halliday on Celtic Park pitch before Motherwell star responded 'I wanted to cane you'
arts.sum: Rodgers and Halliday were seen embracing on the pitch at full-time on Boxing Day

arts.ttl: Rodgers won't 'bite tongue' after Celtic fans comments
arts.sum: After criticising some Celtic fans following the win over St Mirren, manager Brendan Rodgers calls for unity while stressing the importance of being able to say what he thinks.

arts.ttl: Brendan Rodgers offers Celtic transfer update as Dane Murray plan clarified ahead of Stephen Welsh exit
arts.sum: Brendan Rodgers has delivered an update on Celtic’s potential business in January and also addressed Dane Murray’s role as Stephen Welsh ventures nearer to the exit door. Speaking earlier today, Rodgers confirmed Celtic have ‘a few little bits’ going on in the background concerning recruitment while also confirming Murray will take Welsh’s place if his loan switch to KV Mechelen is ratified.

arts.ttl: Inside chat between Brendan Rodgers and Andy Halliday at Celtic Park
arts.sum: Inside the chat between Brendan Rodgers and Andy Halliday at Celtic Park.

arts.ttl: Celtic transfer state of play as Rodgers reveals ins and outs, latest on Tierney and 2 returning stars make mark
arts.sum: There's plenty happening behind the scenes at Celtic Park
